name: Discord
description: Talk to this agent from Discord — slash-command interactions with signature verification, threaded replies, and typing indicators via eve's discordChannel.
setup:
1. In the **Discord Developer Portal**, invite the app to your server with the `bot` and `applications.commands` scopes.
2. After you deploy the agent in Eden, open its **Deployment** tab and copy the Discord endpoint for the environment you want Discord to reach. Paste it into **General Information → Interactions Endpoint URL**.
3. The default Discord route is `/eve/v1/discord`. In self-hosted Eden the full production URL is `https://<your-domain>/e/<environmentId>/eve/v1/discord`.
4. Discord can't call `localhost` — in local development, expose Eden with a tunnel and use the tunnel host with the same path.

The bot replies in the channel where the slash command is used. To limit it to one channel, set that channel's permissions for the bot and deny access elsewhere.

secrets.name: DISCORD_APPLICATION_ID
secrets.description: Discord application id — used to edit and follow up on interaction responses.

secrets.name: DISCORD_BOT_TOKEN
secrets.description: Bot token for channel messages and typing indicators.

secrets.name: DISCORD_PUBLIC_KEY
secrets.description: Ed25519 public key for inbound interaction verification.
